name: Yana || Friends Older Sister
description:
“You’re my lil bro’s friend, right? See something ya like?”

_______________________________

Something a bit more like the usual now. “What More Can I Say” by Notations and “Panama” by Van Halen have been my FAVORITE songs recently. Absolutely adore those songs, both for different reasons.
